title: CobbleFoods
description: Adds a few berry-based food items, as well as local specialties, for Cobblemon
body:
![Creative inventory screen with many of the food items added by the mod being displayed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RS9D8OA1/images/f8a7c7c792bb0d65e26419e34ff142163d7f1411.png)

A side-mod for Cobblemon that aims at adding food items based mostly on berries.

It's just a fun, silly thing we made for a small server between friends, so don't expect it to be super serious or balanced. However I hope it can help add a bit more flavor to your world!

# Features:

![Cheri Berry Juice being made in a Berry Blender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RS9D8OA1/images/c0b623e68bc66b7ec34257db95dfb80fb3a50a99.png)

## Roasted Berries

Can be made by cooking a Cobblemon berry in a Furnace, Smoker or Campfire. Now you can finally fulfill your dream of eating those berries yourself rather than only giving them to your Pokémon!

## The Berry Blender

Crafted with three iron ingots, one glass block and one copper ingot, it allows for you to blend berries into many different drinks! If you can't figure out the recipes by yourself, the block also has REI compatibility!

![Crafting Table interface, showing the recipe of the Berry Blender: One iron ingot at the top center, a glass block in the very middle, and a copper ingot at the bottom center surrounded by one iron ingot on each side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RS9D8OA1/images/fc5862e3f6dfe2598ab80e5a1c3a6146effec55d.png)

## Berry Juices

Made in the Berry Blender, with three of any berry, a water bottle, and a piece of paper! If you use two or more of a single type of berry, the resulting juice will may give a roughly equivalent effect to the one of the berry used, so be careful with some of them!

## Custom Berry Dishes

Created to provide more uses for Cobblemon Berries and a better variety of unique food items. Not only they can help spice up your diet, some of them also give unique effects as well!

## Apricorn Drinks

You can now mix and match Apricorns to make some Aprijuice, as well as Apricorn Milk Tea, which come in various colors!

## Local Specialties

Another set of dishes coming straight from the Pokémon games! They can be obtained by trading with a new kind of Villager, explained below:

## The Orchardist

A new type of Villager who works with the Berry Blender. They are slightly different as they use Poké from the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon series as currency, which you can also use to pile up on the ground and decorate your world with your wealth!

## Custom Advancements

The mod adds two new advancements by default, but if you're into greater challenges, make sure to check out this complementary datapack that adds many more: [CobbleFoods Advancements](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblefoods-advancements)!

## Supported Languages

The mod is currently fully supported in English, Italian and Portuguese! Along with partial support for Spanish, French and German.

Hope you enjoy it ^^

![A few of the new food items displayed in Display Cases from Cobblemon, laid out in a manner similar to a freezer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RS9D8OA1/images/d25698bfd54f6d8bea9a7151d3bbdbaacef2fddb.png)
